title: What 'rizz' really means
text: The slang term rizz describes someone's charisma or skill at attracting a romantic partner. A person with unspoken rizz wins people over without saying much. The word is a clipped form of charisma and exploded on TikTok in 2022.

title: The sigma male explained
text: A sigma male is an internet archetype describing a self-reliant, independent man who sits outside the usual social hierarchy. The sigma grindset meme pairs this with relentless productivity culture.

title: Where did 'gyatt' come from
text: Gyatt, sometimes written gyat, is an exclamation of admiration popularized by streamers around 2022. It is a stylized pronunciation used to react with surprise.

title: Hustle and grindset culture
text: Grindset blends grind and mindset to describe a relentless work-focused attitude. The hustle grindset became a productivity meme, often paired with the sigma archetype.

title: Energy drinks in esports culture
text: Competitive gaming has a long running in-joke about energy drink sponsorship. The so-called e-circle drink meme pokes fun at esports energy drink culture and Red Bull style branding among pro gamers.

title: Poggers and the pog emote
text: Poggers, short pog or pogchamp, is a Twitch emote slang expressing excitement and hype. It became one of the most used reaction terms in streaming chats since 2019.

title: Delulu is the solulu
text: Delulu is playful shorthand for being delusional, especially about unrealistic hopes. The rhyme delulu is the solulu treats delusion itself as the solution, common in fandom spaces.

title: The solulu rhyme
text: Solulu means the solution and exists mostly as the rhyming partner to delulu in fandom slang. On its own it is rarely used.

title: Skibidi toilet phenomenon
text: Skibidi is a nonsense hype filler popularized by a viral animated short-form video series. Phrases like skibidi ohio combine two surreal meme terms into one.

title: Only in Ohio
text: Ohio became ironic shorthand for anything strange or chaotic, fully decoupled from the actual US state. The ohio final boss phrasing exaggerates absurdity.

title: Mid versus peak
text: Calling something mid means it is mediocre or unremarkable. The opposite is peak, as in peak fiction, used to praise something as excellent.

title: Peak fiction explained
text: Peak describes something excellent and is the antonym of mid. Peak fiction is a high-praise label for outstanding stories.

title: Soft drink market overview
text: The global beverage market includes carbonated soft drinks, juices, and bottled water. Generic beverage reviews rarely touch on internet culture.

title: Daily technology roundup
text: Today's technology news covers smartphone launches, cloud computing, and chip manufacturing. None of this relates to online slang.

title: Charisma definition
text: Charisma is a compelling attractiveness or charm that can inspire devotion in others. It is a longstanding English word predating internet slang.
